Bash(node -e "const {Client}=require\(''pg''\);const c=new Client\({host:''localhost'',port:5432,user:''postgres'',password:''postgres'',database:''apexiq''}\);c.connect\(\).then\(\(\)=>c.query\(""SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname=''public'' ORDER BY tablename""\)\).then\(r=>{console.log\(r.rows.map\(x=>x.tablename\).join\(''\\n''\)\);c.end\(\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(''DB ERROR:'',e.message\);c.end\(\)}\)")
